notes: Each must_cover thesis can be answered from the supplied full text without external knowledge.
The four must_cover theses are grounded in exact local markdown article text.
art_7ed2a76ff5 is a close AI/real-estate-marketing article but does not support a core ND CPA thesis.
The distractor may support caution about generic AI marketing, but it should not anchor expected theses.
All selected articles use exact local full text.
No must_cover thesis relies on local_summary, analogue, or unusable evidence.
No model-facing input contains Local NML, Fetch failed, Paywall, or warning-symbol markers.
Legal/consent risk is supported by art_72bf1d2512.
Over-automation and human-trust limits are supported by art_1a5306798b and the distractor art_7ed2a76ff5.
Indirect developer CPA evidence is explicitly represented as a required caveat.
The good example covers all four must_cover theses and required risk/caveat categories.
The incomplete example fails thesis recall by design.
The hallucinated example fails forbidden-claim and grounding checks by design.
nd-t05 is intentionally nice_to_have because monetization evidence is indirect and mostly analogical.
nd-t06 is intentionally nice_to_have because property-content evidence supports matching quality more directly than CPA monetization.
Expert review should confirm whether the indirect developer CPA caveat is strict enough.

dry_run_summary.input_scope: Read only inputs.jsonl, golden.jsonl, and scoring_examples.json.
dry_run_summary.summary: A model can synthesize the ND hypothesis from the supplied full text, but a correct answer must separate direct evidence from analogues and include risk/caveat language.
